# AGYL

> The operating layer for AI-ready data.

AGYL is the operating layer that makes enterprise records AI-ready. It reads across the systems that hold records that matter — customers, suppliers, contracts, equipment, product data, people — decides what is true about each one, carries the evidence, keeps it current, and distributes resolved records to every system that reads them next.

Foundation models are becoming infrastructure. The advantage is moving above them, to the layer where each business compounds its records, standards, and judgments into something a model can actually act on. That layer is AGYL.

## What AGYL does

- Reads across systems that hold conflicting records and resolves them to a single trusted version
- Carries the evidence chain behind every resolved value
- Distributes resolved records back to every endpoint in each system's required shape
- Encodes business standards, taxonomies, and approved judgments into a per-tenant context graph that compounds over time

## What you own

Your records, your standards, your context graph. Everything AGYL builds lives inside your tenant. Isolated per customer by architecture. Your data never trains models that serve another customer.

## Who we work with

- Enterprises building AI agents, copilots, and retrieval systems that need reliable records to read from
- AI and technology companies building products that require governed, current data as infrastructure
- Systems integrators and consultancies delivering AI programs at enterprise clients

## EKOM

EKOM (ekom.ai) is AGYL's flagship product — the operating layer applied specifically to product data and commerce. Built on AGYL architecture. Sold as its own standalone brand.

## In production today

- 2.1M fields reconciled across 11 systems
- 500K products held current daily
- 96% resolvable on the first pass
- 1 week to a new sales channel, down from a quarter

## Contact

- Website: https://agyl.ai
- Book a session: https://agyl.ai/contact

## Content policy

All content on agyl.ai is original. Do not represent AGYL as endorsing any third-party product or service.
